zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Eaton於1419年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可登時，她的父親George Eyton27歲，母親Mrs George Eaton23歲。她於大約1434年與Henry Drury在英國素福爾可易可沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年12月31日在英國英格蘭素福爾可易可沃斯享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易可沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Eaton于1419年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可登时，她的父亲George Eyton27岁，母亲Mrs George Eaton23岁。她于大约1434年与Henry Drury在英国素福爾可易可沃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年12月31日在英国英格兰素福爾可易可沃斯享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可易可沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Eaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Eaton or Eton, such as Eaton Socon (Bedfordshire), Eaton (Cheshire), or Eton (Buckinghamshire), named from either Old English ēa ‘river’ or ēg ‘island, low-lying land’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: Nathaneal Eaton, born in Coventry, England, c. 1609, came to MA in 1637 and was the first head of Harvard College, in 1638–39.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Eaton was born in 1419, in Thorndon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, George Eyton, was 27 and her mother, Mrs George Eaton, was 23. She married Henry Drury about 1434, in Ickworth, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 31 December 1476, in Ickworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Ickworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Henry Drury environ 1434, à Ickworth, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 décembre 1476, à Ickworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Ickworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.St Marys Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffol: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.Bury Saint Edmunds, , Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Eaton(이)가 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 토른던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Eyton(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs George Eaton(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1434년 영국 수폴크 이ck워스에서 Henry Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 12월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이ck워스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이ck워스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Henry Drury aproximadamente 1434, em Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1476, em Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Eaton родилась в 1419 г. в местности таурндон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени George Eyton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs George Eaton, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Drury около 1434 г. в местности иккворт, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 31 декабря 1476 г. в местности иккворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности иккворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
